text: library(tesselle) load core packages: tabula: analysis, seriation visualization archaeological count data; kairos: analysis chronological patterns archaeological count data; khroma: colour schemes scientific data visualization.

title: tesselle: Easily Install and Load 'tesselle' Packages — tesselle-package
text: Easy install load key packages 'tesselle' suite single step. 'tesselle' suite collection packages research teaching archaeology. packages focus quantitative analysis methods developed archaeology. 'tesselle' packages designed work seamlessly together complement general-purpose specialized statistical packages. packages can used explore analyze common data types archaeology: count data, compositional data chronological data. Learn 'tesselle' <https://www.tesselle.org>.
